---
title: "`omni-scrna` monitor"
format:
  html:
    df-print: kable   # or "paged", "gt", "table"
editor: source
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
ORG <- "omni-scrna"
WINDOW_HOURS <- 48
NUM_LATEST <- 2 # limit: number of commits per author/repo

# helper functions
.datemod <- function(u) as.POSIXct(u, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", 
                                   tz = "UTC") 
.datechr <- function(u) .datemod(u) %>% 
  format("%d.%m.%Y (%H:%M)", tz = "Europe/Zurich")
.null2na <- function(u) ifelse(is.null(u), NA, u)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(gh)

# if local, get token from file; o/w from ENV on GA
.token <- ifelse(Sys.getenv("GITHUB_ACTIONS") == "true",
                 Sys.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN"),
                 read.table("~/.credentials",sep="=")$V2)

stopifnot(nzchar(.token))

repos <- gh(paste0("/orgs/", ORG, "/repos"),
            .token = .token,
            .limit = 1000)
repos <- sapply(repos, .subset2, "html_url")

# data.frame(repos = repos)
```

Updated: `r .datechr(Sys.time())` <br>

## Quick summary

In this [`r ORG`](`r dirname(repos)[1]`) organization, you have [`r length(repos)` repositories](`r paste0("https://github.com/orgs/", ORG, "/repositories")`):<br>`r paste0("[", basename(repos), "](", repos, ") ")`. 

## List of open PRs

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# getting list of open PRs
open_prs <- c()
for(i in 1:length(repos)) {
  prs <- gh("GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls",
            owner = "omni-scrna", 
            repo = basename(repos[i]),
            state = "open", per_page = 100,
            .token = .token)
  open_prs <- c(open_prs, prs)
}

# basic setup for kable
parse_pr_info <- function(u) {
  data.frame(repo = paste0("[", basename(u$base$repo$url), "](",
                           u$base$repo$svn_url, ")"),
             sender = u$user$login,
             title = u$title,
             pr = paste0("[", basename(u$html_url), "](", u$html_url, ")",
                         ifelse(u$draft, " [DRAFT]","")),
             last_update = .datechr(u$updated_at))
}

prs_df <- lapply(open_prs, parse_pr_info) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>%
  arrange(last_update)

prs_df

```


## Active branches (last `r WINDOW_HOURS` hours)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

cmts_df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(repos)) {
  branches <- gh("/repos/:owner/:repo/branches", owner = ORG, 
                 repo = basename(repos[i]), .token = .token)
  for(j in 1:length(branches)) {
    ctr <- gh("/repos/:owner/:repo/commits?sha=:sha",
              owner = ORG, repo = basename(repos[i]), per_page = NUM_LATEST,
              sha = branches[[j]]$name, .token = .token)
    commits_df <- data.frame(author = sapply(ctr, 
                                             function(u) .null2na(u$committer$login)),
                             repo = paste0("[", basename(repos[i]), "](", repos[i], ")"),
                             branch = paste0("[", branches[[j]]$name, "](",
                                             repos[i],"/tree/", branches[[j]]$name, ")"),
                             message = sapply(ctr, 
                                            function(u) paste0("[", substr(u$commit$message, 1, 40),
                                                               "](", u$html_url, ")")),
                             date = sapply(ctr, function(u) .datemod(u$commit$author$date))
                             ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(author), date >= as.POSIXct(Sys.time()-WINDOW_HOURS*60*60, 
                                              tz="Europe/Zurich")) %>%
    mutate(date = .datechr(date))
  cmts_df <- rbind(cmts_df, commits_df)
    
  }
}


cmts_df %>% 
  arrange(desc(date)) %>%
  group_by(author, repo) %>% 
  slice_head(n = NUM_LATEST) %>%
  ungroup %>%
  arrange(desc(date))


```
